message.content: This section identifies the entity "点点数据" (Diandian Data) and functions as a heading for product-related inquiries. It can answer questions regarding where or how to direct product consultation, support requests, or general inquiries for 点点数据's offerings. The section does not contain dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types.
